# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp2
            DeleteOnTermination: true
  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow SSH and HTTP traffic
      VpcId: vpc-12345678
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
Outputs:
  InstancePublicDNSName:
    Description: The public DNS name of the EC2 instance
    Value: !GetAtt EC2Instance.PublicDnsName
